text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity as I stand before the glass doors, peering into this impeccably clean and modern hallway. It is quiet, yet there is an undercurrent of activity—evidence in the well-kept space and the signage. On entering the gallery area, the bold colors and the "R+D" wall draw my attention. Surrounded by digital and textual information, I’m invigorated and contemplative—a place meant for thought, innovation, and perhaps even a little bewilderment. The space feels like a temple devoted to emerging ideas, and I feel both like a participant and a witness in the ongoing dance of discovery.
